variant_description: Simple three-station SimPy implementation (order -> pay -> pickup) covering 120 minutes of operation with configurable station counts and arrival rates. Matches the GitHub ZubairL/Simulation_Drive_thru repo, which is the candidate implementation link. Serves Scenario 1 (Station Count Sizing) primarily.

Chick-fil-A-style congestion management case study variant focused on peak-hour operational policies — dual lanes, secondary order takers, expedited payment. Based on the INFORMS Transactions on Education teaching case (context row 2, paywalled). Target technology is not committed in the walkthrough (INFORMS teaching cases typically ship with Arena or AnyLogic implementations, but the Seeder could not access the paper to confirm). des_product_code is NULL per the nullability rule for proposed variants.

Extended drive-thru model incorporating self-service kiosks alongside traditional counter ordering. Based on aggregated hybrid-ordering research (context row 3). The literature uses multiple implementation tools (Witness, FlexSim, AnyLogic, SimPy); no single target technology is committed. des_product_code is NULL per the nullability rule for proposed variants.
